title: Handle Starlette TestClient httpx deprecation
description: Why this exists: project-LICHEN-py4c.1.16 pins Starlette/httpx to the tested line and dashboard/client tests pass, but the test suite reports StarletteDeprecationWarning: using httpx with starlette.testclient is deprecated; install httpx2 instead. What needs to be done: decide whether to adopt httpx2, pin Starlette/httpx to a no-warning compatibility line, or replace TestClient usage; update dependency ranges and tests with evidence.
notes: No-hardware implementation evidence (2026-07-03): replaced all live Starlette TestClient usage in Python tests with httpx.AsyncClient + ASGITransport. python/tests/dashboard/test_dashboard.py now uses an async ASGITransport fixture under pytest asyncio auto mode; python/tests/sim/test_api.py tick event-count test now uses AsyncClient. No runtime dependency change; httpx was already a dev dependency. Live source/test search has no remaining TestClient/starlette.testclient references; remaining rg hits are historical Beads notes only.\nValidation evidence (2026-07-03, local no-hardware): cd python && uv run pytest -q -W error::DeprecationWarning tests/dashboard/test_dashboard.py tests/sim/test_api.py::TestSimulationTick::test_tick_simulation_counts_events => 26 passed in 0.14s. cd python && uv run ruff check tests/dashboard/test_dashboard.py tests/sim/test_api.py => All checks passed. git diff --check => passed. Review evidence: Aquinas reported no P0/P1/P2 findings; async fixture valid under asyncio_mode=auto, no remaining TestClient under python/, and warning-as-error targeted tests passed 26 passed. Kant reported no P0/P1/P2 findings; no remaining tracked TestClient/starlette.testclient references, no Starlette lifespan hooks lost, httpx already in CI dev dependency path; reran dashboard+sim tests 96 passed, Ruff passed, packaging tests 6 passed. Descartes reported no P0/P1/P2 findings; warning-as-error targeted tests passed, Ruff passed, rg found no remaining TestClient usage in python/tests.
close_reason: Completed: replaced live Starlette TestClient use with httpx ASGITransport async clients; warning-as-error targeted tests, Ruff, diff check, and three independent reviews passed.
